label: Resolved 'Escalate repeat-call skip to terminate after 6+ consecutive skips. The repeat-call circuit breaker (runtime_adapter.rs:420-453) skips identical tool calls after 3 repeats via ToolCallHookAction::skip. But a stubborn model may keep retrying indefinitely, wasting turns. After 6+ consecutive skips of the same (tool_name, args) hash, escalate to ToolCallHookAction::ter' in 1 iteration(s) using tensorzero::function_name::task_planning
